next_steps: Perform orbital tissue biopsy (targeted at the enhancing nerve sheath or fat) for histopathology, IgG4 immunostaining, and flow cytometry
Order full autoimmune serology panel including ANA, anti-Ro/SSA, anti-La/SSB, and anti-dsDNA
Request pathology re-review and immunohistochemistry for C4d and mucin on the previously biopsied abdominal skin specimen
Consult rheumatology for evaluation of potential systemic IgG4-related disease or systemic lupus erythematosus
Obtain whole-body FDG-PET/CT to identify subclinical sites of systemic inflammation or occult malignancy
